breakdown: This PR migrated from a complex ~200-line inline polling mechanism that queries GitHub API and waits for VERDICT comments to a simple reusable workflow call. The removed code demonstrated solid error handling (API failure tracking, rate limit handling, validation) and clear commenting. The new approach delegates logic to an external reusable workflow (jleechanorg/agent-orchestrator), improving DRY but introducing external dependency. No test files visible in the diff and traditional type safety doesn't apply to YAML workflows.
key_changes: Replaced inline GHA polling step (~200 lines of shell) with single 'uses:' call to reusable workflow
Externalized skeptic-gate logic to jleechanorg/agent-orchestrator repository
Removed explicit trigger comment posting to PR
Removed detailed API failure handling and rate limit management
Delegated error handling and verdict parsing to external reusable workflow
